phase1_capabilities.name: MSI Afterburner profile launch templates
phase1_capabilities.reachability: Likely reachable by launching MSI Afterburner with profile arguments
phase1_capabilities.notes: Future app can map friendly preset names to MSI profile slots after manual verification.

phase1_capabilities.name: MSI Afterburner profile/config backup
phase1_capabilities.control_owner: App can back up files later
phase1_capabilities.notes: Future writes require backup and restore manifest first.

phase1_capabilities.name: Windows CPU power setting viewer
phase1_capabilities.notes: Values are captured for active scheme only in Phase 1.

phase1_capabilities.name: Windows CPU power setting writes later
phase1_capabilities.reachability: Likely possible for readable settings, not tested
phase1_capabilities.notes: Future app should export or clone plans before writes.

phase1_capabilities.name: NVIDIA telemetry through nvidia-smi
phase1_capabilities.notes: Good candidate for MVP telemetry if available.

phase1_capabilities.name: NVML Python telemetry later
phase1_capabilities.notes: Use later if nvidia-smi polling is too slow or awkward.

phase1_capabilities.name: LibreHardwareMonitor sensors
phase1_capabilities.notes: Useful for temperatures, fans, voltages, and motherboard sensors if supported.

phase1_capabilities.name: Gigabyte/GCC discovery
phase1_capabilities.notes: Fan control remains unproven and should stay experimental.

phase1_capabilities.name: Game and tool process detection
phase1_capabilities.notes: Future app can use editable seed list and per-game overrides.

phase1_capabilities.name: Restore and panic restore framework
phase1_capabilities.reachability: Planned; file backups and power plan exports are feasible later
phase1_capabilities.phase1_status: Architecture only. No restore point or backup created outside app folder.

phase2_summary.phase3_recommendation: Backup/restore foundation and first explicitly-approved apply tests. Build restore manifests, export/clone active power plan, back up MSI Afterburner configs/profiles, verify MSI profile slot mapping manually, and add one or two guarded CPU setting apply tests with immediate restore. No fan control or embedded-controller writes yet.
